data.name: Smiling Girls
data.detailed_description:
Help the beautiful girls to immerse themselves in their memories and remember the wonderful moments of their lives. Smiling Girls is a classic puzzle game with multiple difficulty levels and beautiful arts. All the characters appearing in this game are over 18 years old.

  • A game of logic
  • Works of art
  • Pleasant music
  • Steam Achievements

Keyboard H: Full level

Sometimes girls can see covered nudity, which is transmitted through their outfits. Sensitive persons are advised to play with care. However, it does not contain any explicit nudity

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 x64
  • 處理器: Intel Celeron
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 512MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 x64
  • 處理器: Intel Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GT 820M 2048MB
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
